_comment:
Site registry for Adler.
Generated from the Sherlock project's data.json (MIT-licensed,
sherlock-project/sherlock) by scripts/import_sherlock.py.
Detections are imported unverified — run `adler --doctor` to
validate signatures. Hand-edit freely; re-running the importer
overwrites this file.
